description_long: This is a black bottle with a matte finish and a cylindrical body that tapers into a long neck, topped with a gray cap. The front label features bold white text reading 'DEAD MAN'S FINGERS' above a stylized skull graphic, with additional smaller text below. The bottle's surface is mostly black, with a small purple rat illustration and halo on the back. The cap appears to be made of plastic or metal and is a lighter gray than the body. The bottle is likely made of glass, giving it a hard and glossy appearance, and is designed to hold liquid. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the branding is prominent and visually striking.
description: A black, matte-finished bottle with a gray cap, bold white 'DEAD MAN'S FINGERS' branding, and a skull graphic on the front. The back features a small purple rat illustration.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'DEAD MAN'S FINGERS' label, skull graphic, and most branding details.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal visible detail, mostly showing the black surface and edge of the label.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a small purple rat illustration with a halo on the lower part of the bottle.
description_view_3: Angled side view revealing part of the front label and the black body, with less branding visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: White text 'DEAD MAN'S FINGERS' with a stylized skull graphic on the front label; small purple rat with halo illustration on the back.
